hero.subtitle: From 24/7 emergency support to expert specialist consultations, Elite Hospital provides advanced healthcare with a human touch. Your health is our priority, every single day.

departments.title: Our Specialized Services
departments.subtitle: Discover our range of advanced medical services, expert doctors, and specialized care units dedicated to your recovery.

diagnostics.subtitle: Accurate blood tests, X-rays, and scans under one roof using advanced medical technology.

insurance.title: Cashless Insurance Partners
insurance.subtitle: We partner with major insurance providers for a hassle-free and transparent healthcare experience.

about.title: Trusted Healthcare for the People of Shimoga
about.subtitle: For years, Elite Hospital has been a pillar of health for the Shimoga community. We bring world-class multispeciality treatment to our city so that local families don't have to travel far for quality care.
about.mission: To bring advanced, affordable, and compassionate healthcare to every family in Shimoga.
about.patient_first: We treat every patient like family, ensuring they feel safe, heard, and cared for at every step.
